# OpenModeration

OpenModeration is an open-source unified moderation platform. It provides a single API to route, moderate, and manage content across multiple providers (OpenAI, Azure, HuggingFace, Mistral, etc.) with automated workflows and DSA-compliant audit trails.

## Key Features
- **Single Integration**: One API key, one normalized format for all providers.
- **Smart Provider Selection**: Automatic routing based on language, type, and cost.
- **Bring Your Own Keys (BYOK)**: Use your existing provider subscriptions with no markup.
- **Automated Moderation Rules**: Define forbidden words, category thresholds, and your community charter. Rules enforce automatically.
- **Compliance Dashboard**: Full audit trails and exportable reports for DSA and regulatory compliance.
- **Self-Hosted or Cloud**: Deploy on your own infrastructure via Docker for full data sovereignty, or use the managed cloud.

## Quick Links
- Website: https://www.openmoderation.com
- Features: https://www.openmoderation.com/features
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/open-moderation/open-moderation
- Pricing: https://www.openmoderation.com/pricing
- DSA Compliance: https://www.openmoderation.com/dsa-compliance
- FAQ: https://www.openmoderation.com/faq

## API Example
```bash
curl -X POST https://api.openmoderation.com/v1/moderation \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer om_key_..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"input": "text to moderate"}'
```

## License
AGPL v3. Fully auditable, no vendor lock-in.
